info.name: Vebgenix API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Vebgenix Backend.
Import alongside Vebgenix-Dev.postman_environment.json.

Required environment variables:
  base_url          - Lambda Function URL / API Gateway / local REST base URL
  appsync_url       - AWS AppSync GraphQL endpoint
  access_token      - Set automatically by 'Get Token'
  tenant_id         - Your tenant slug/ID
  campus_id         - Default campus ObjectId
  cognito_region    - e.g. ap-south-1
  cognito_client_id - Cognito App Client ID

item.name: 🔐 Auth (Cognito)
item.description: Authentication is via AWS Cognito. 'Get Token' sets access_token automatically.

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.id) pm.environment.set('fee_category_id', r.id);

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Grade 10 Annual Fee 25-26",
  "campusId": "{{campus_id}}",
  "academicYearId": "",
  "classId": "",
  "feeCategoryId": "",
  "feeScheduleId": "",
  "allocationMethod": "PRO_RATA",
  "components": [
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Tuition Fee", "amount": 50000, "isOptional": false, "priorityOrder": 1 },
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Lab Fee",     "amount": 5000,  "isOptional": false, "priorityOrder": 2 },
    { "feeHeadId": "", "feeHeadName": "Sports Fee",  "amount": 2000,  "isOptional": true,  "priorityOrder": 3 }
  ]
}

item.name: Copy Fee Pattern to Next Year

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.razorpayOrderId) pm.environment.set('razorpay_order_id', r.razorpayOrderId);
const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.id || r._id) pm.environment.set('student_id', r.id || r._id);

item.name: Promotions
Promote Students - MANUAL sections / Copy fee pattern
Promote Students - AUTO_SHUFFLE / Assign existing fee
Promote Students - EXCEL_IMPORT / Copy fee pattern

item.description: Promotion creates a new target-year academic enrollment. Admission No stays unchanged. Registration No and Roll No stay PENDING unless generated separately. Fee invoices are created only when feeAction is ASSIGN_EXISTING or COPY_PATTERN.

exec: const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.id || r._id) pm.environment.set('exam_id', r.id || r._id);
const r = pm.response.json(); if (r.key) pm.environment.set('upload_key', r.key);

item.name: 🔗 AppSync GraphQL
item.description: Direct AppSync GraphQL calls for the Lambda resolvers. Use appsync_url and Cognito access_token.

item.name: Copy Fee Pattern to Next Year
